## Test Plan / 测试

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run test:desktop`
- [ ] `npm run release:check:unsigned`

## Security / 安全影响

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, certificates, private keys, or local data files are committed.
- [ ] API responses, logs, audit metadata, and diagnostics remain redacted.
- [ ] Dangerous local actions still require allowlist and confirmation.

## Release Impact / 发布影响

- [ ] Packaging scripts still work for the affected platform.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated when behavior changed.
